name: Ashley Jackson
ai_summary: Ashley Jackson has 20 years of childcare experience and is seeking full-time or part-time home daycare positions in Marietta, GA. She employs a patient, individualized conflict resolution approach by separating children to address situations one-on-one.

transcripts.q3: Hello. My name is Ashley Jackson and I have been working in the childcare field since my oldest was just 12 years old. She is now 20 years old in a college student. I enjoy working with children of all ages, watching them, and engaging in their development, and their growth. I like engaging with the parents and telling them about their child's day. Just watching children overall just learn and grow into the best versions of themselves.
transcripts.q4: I'm located in Marietta Georgia on the border of Kennesaw in Marietta so I can work on either location. Marietta ZIP code, 300, 66 or Kennesaw 30 144 and I would like to keep my traveling range between 5 to 10 miles. Thank you.
transcripts.q5: I'm looking for full-time or part-time. I'm not partial to either or neither. One of them open to my availability is from 8 a.m. to 4 p.m. Monday through Friday.
transcripts.q6: My experience in the childcare field when dealing with two children, who have a conflict, I tried to separate them speak with them individually, get on their level stoop, down to their level, literally physically, look them in the eye and try to find out exactly what caused it, what started it and what their role was and figure out how we can make amends with one another to still go along throughout the day and get along and have safe and fun way.
